creator: tj+freebsd_ports@a13.fr
text:
I'm now tracking bug #261637 instead of bug #260207 for
`www/rubygem-gollum-lib' port. There is a patch attached in the PR.
If/when it's commited, I'll update `devel/ruby-gems' one.

  No new version of Ruby Gems was released since 3.3.6.

  I went to #rubyports IRC channel (EFnet) a few days ago, asking for
help and/or advice in the process of commiting this patch, but no
activity there so far.
